# <!--name-->Verify Path Exists<!--/name-->

<!--description-->
Verify that a file or directory exists, with optional non-empty file enforcement.
<!--/description-->

## Inputs

<!--inputs-->
| Name                | Description                               | Required | Default    |
|---------------------|-------------------------------------------|----------|------------|
| `path`              | Path to verify.                           | `true`   | ` `        |
| `description`       | Human-readable artifact description.      | `false`  | `artifact` |
| `require-non-empty` | Fail when the path is an empty file.      | `false`  | `false`    |
| `working-directory` | Directory used to resolve relative paths. | `false`  | `.`        |
<!--/inputs-->

## Outputs

<!--outputs-->
| Name | Description |
|------|-------------|
<!--/outputs-->

## Usage

<!--usage action="Nick2bad4u/workflow-templates/.github/actions/verify-path-exists" version="main"-->

```yaml
steps:
 - name: "Verify coverage artifact"
   uses: "Nick2bad4u/workflow-templates/.github/actions/verify-path-exists@main"
   with:
    description: "coverage/lcov.info"
    path: "${{ steps.vitest.outputs.coverage_path }}"
```

<!--/usage-->
